headline: Clark Howard: $200 Walgreens Quote Became $22 at Cost Plus Drugs for This NC Man
summary: Gary from North Carolina walked into Walgreens to pick up a generic prescription and got quoted over $200 out of pocket. He paid $22 instead, by doing one thing differently. That gap is not a fluke. It is how traditional pharmacy pricing is designed to work, and most patients never question it. The Quote That ... headline: Costco will do something it only does 7 times a year
summary: Having enjoyed a Costco membership for 20 years, I can tell you there are many things the company does right. headline: Walmart Tests Sam's Club Fee Hike Against Member Value And Growth
summary: Sam's Club, owned by Walmart (NasdaqGS:WMT), is raising annual membership fees for the first time in four years. The company is also increasing the Sam's Cash rewards cap for Plus members as part of the same update. These changes sit alongside plans to open new Sam's Club locations to compete more directly with Costco and BJ's Wholesale Club. Walmart, through Sam's Club, operates in the warehouse club segment where value, bulk purchasing and membership perks are central to customer...
